predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien within the meaning of the Act (does not prove Belgian nationality).

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national (not a Union citizen and not enjoying Community free movement rights).

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is in illegal stay on the territory (present but not meeting entry or stay conditions).

predicates.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a legally established risk of absconding for the person.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the Act.

predicates.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: criterion_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false/falsified documents, or committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: criterion_subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection.

predicates.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_prior_international_protection_application
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
predicates.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
